calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, August 18, 2016 in Department 525:
Veroneeka Erchinger, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Feyisayo Winfunke.
No Appearance by Appellant/Defendant George E. Santos Colorado.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Respondent/Plaintiff and witness are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Veroneeka Ercjomger testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - blue folder - text messages

Feyisayo Winfunke testifies on behalf of Veroneeka Erchinger.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Judgment Entered
